paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces InstructGPT through a novel three-step process combining supervised fine-tuning with human demonstrations, followed by reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) to align the model with human preferences for helpfulness, honesty, and harmlessness
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chatbots, general-purpose language assistance, and applications requiring adherence to explicit user directives
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human intent to ensure they follow instructions safely and effectively across diverse tasks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with PPO
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Same alignment framework as InstructGPT 1.3B but scaled up to 6 billion parameters, demonstrating improved instruction-following capabilities while maintaining better safety and reliability than base GPT-3 models
raw_extraction.application: Advanced chatbots, specialized instruction-following systems, and applications needing nuanced human-aligned responses
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling instruction-following capabilities in large language models while mitigating harmful behaviors
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: The largest InstructGPT variant, incorporating extensive human feedback to enhance truthfulness, reduce toxicity, and maintain strong instruction-following abilities despite its massive scale. Extension: Introduced PPO-PTX (PPO with pretraining likelihood mixing) to mitigate alignment tax effects on public NLP datasets
raw_extraction.application: High-capacity instruction-following systems, complex multi-turn dialogue, and advanced AI assistants requiring broad contextual understanding
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing instruction-following capabilities with safety and minimizing performance degradation across diverse tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introducing **Instruction-Following Alignment** via supervised fine-tuning on human-generated demonstration datasets (SFT), improving adherence to natural language instructions over base GPT-3 models
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose instruction-following, chatbots, customer assistance, open-ended generation, coding, and multi-turn dialogue
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human intent and reducing harmful behaviors through structured instruction tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Same core methodology as InstructGPT (SFT) 1.3B but scaled up to 6B parameters for improved instruction-following robustness
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose instruction-following, chatbots, customer assistance, open-ended generation, coding, and multi-turn dialogue
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling instruction-following capabilities across model sizes
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Extremely large-scale instruction-following model trained on diverse human-labeled demonstrations, achieving superior alignment with human intent
raw_extraction.application: Advanced instruction-following, specialized chatbots, complex reasoning, and multi-domain problem-solving
raw_extraction.research_problem: Maximizing instruction-following accuracy and reliability across diverse tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuned reward model that ranks responses based on human preference data, enabling reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). Uses batch processing of K=4–9 response rankings for efficiency
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Broader Internet data (same as base model)
raw_extraction.application: Internal reward estimation for RLHF training pipeline
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing accurate reward functions for RLHF alignment
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reward Modeling (RM) via ranking human-preference comparisons
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Combines SFT demonstrations with RLHF using PPO, incorporating a KL-divergence penalty to balance exploration/exploitation and prevent over-optimization toward reward model biases. Initialized from the RM
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Broader Internet data (same as base model)
raw_extraction.application: Highly aligned instruction-following, safe and helpful chatbots
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human values via RLHF
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces InstructGPT through RLHF combined with supervised fine-tuning, enabling instruction-following capabilities from a base language model. Demonstrates improved truthfulness, toxicity control, and generalization to new tasks without explicit supervision
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: OpenAI API playground prompts (OpenAI customer data)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language tasks including chat, instruction following, creative writing, dialogue, and code-related tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models to human intent and improving instruction-following capabilities
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces PPO-ptx fine-tuning technique that mitigates performance degradation ('alignment tax') observed during RLHF fine-tuning, allowing better retention of public NLP dataset performance while maintaining instruction-following capabilities
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: OpenAI API playground prompts (OpenAI customer data)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language tasks with enhanced instruction-following and reduced hallucination
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing instruction-following ability with public dataset performance during RLHF alignment
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with Pretrained Update Technique (PPO-ptx)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced **Instruction Tuning**—fine-tuning a pre-trained language model (originally GPT-3) using human feedback to align outputs with explicit user instructions, improving adherence to constraints and reducing harmful responses
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Combination of web text corpora (likely including RedPajama, filtered datasets)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose instruction-following, chatbots, customer assistance, constrained generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human intent and safety while maintaining utility across diverse tasks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with human feedback (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback, RLHF)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback
